## Security Review

- [ ] No real API keys, tokens, cookies, sessions, private keys, certificates, or passwords are committed.
- [ ] No private customer data, company-internal URLs, internal documents, or secret-bearing screenshots are committed.
- [ ] `.env`, logs, build outputs, local runtime data, and generated exports are not included.
- [ ] Auth, API key, logging, model-provider, or deployment changes have been reviewed for secret exposure.

## Documentation

- [ ] README / README_CN updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Usage or deployment docs updated when setup or operation changed.
- [ ] OpenAPI or SDK docs updated when public API changed.
